Requester 1

The export retry question includes a current status, a browser note, and the next response owner.

Requester 2

The folder access request has a separate path, a different owner, and an unrelated action queue.

Requester 3

The shortcut timing note tracks keyboard preferences, setup steps, and a pending follow-up.

Re: Export retry question

Thanks for reaching out. We retried the export and saw a browser interruption, so the next attempt is queued for tomorrow morning.

The current tab still has enough context for a retry, but the user needs to keep the page open until the next run starts.

This detail pane is useful on its own, while the inbox pane beside it is another useful region with different records.

That detail pane has real text, but the page is still a multi-pane app shell with two independent regions. Clean mode should reject it.
